title: The Discords That Occurred
description: One such source of discord was the uprising of Sulayman b. Hisham b. 'Abd al-Malik in 'Amman after the killing of al-Walid b. Yazid. According to Abmad b. Zuhayr-'Ali b. Mubammad (alMada'ini): When al-Walid was killed, Sulayman b. Hishim came out of prison-he had been imprisoned in 'Ammin939-took what revenues there were in 'Amman, and made for Damascus, where he began cursing al-Walid and upbraiding him for being an unbeliever. In this year the people of Himg attacked the dependents of 118261 al= Abbas b. al-Walid.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
